message: Stage -1.2 drafted angle=0 v1 mode=cold-start runner=codex/gpt-5.5 status=completed

Review boundary stage_0.5_to_0 routed to stage_0 (cap exhausted): Case 2 (Bucket A, assumption strengthening) + regression pattern (a) same flags repeat verbatim across all 4 reviews (sharpness/endpoint-attainment on thm:k-sharp-dual-confirmed; dropped root-n stochastic checkerboard remainder on thm:inference) — producer's own Stage-0.k hook surfaced both as proposed premises and, after refutation, classified sharp-dual as regime_defining. The .tex itself (ass:regular) deliberately disclaims sharpness/attainment and (ass:finite-cell) supplies only pointwise b_K / o(m_n^{-1/2}) control, so the exact closed-interval sharpness IS the headline kernel: granting endpoint-attainment is regime_defining → (2c) theorem_split. Loop_guard does not fire (theorem_splits=0) and the conditional-on-attainment Kellerer transport-dual theorem is not a tautology (no split_collapsed). The inference defect is a caveat-level rate strengthening of an existing regularity assumption, granted in the same redraft.

Review boundary stage_0.5_to_0 routed to stage_0 (cap exhausted): Case 2 (Bucket A) + regression pattern (a): same two flags recur across all 4 reviews, so the producer is bouncing off an upstream statement defect. Applying the (2a′) over-precision test to the producer's `regime_defining`-labelled [ass:sharp-dual-no-gap-endpoint-selectors]: the reviewer's defect is endpoint ATTAINMENT + measurable selectors + dual no-gap for a strict-indicator (lsc) kernel — a regularity artifact of an OVER-STATED focal object (a closed sharp interval with attained endpoints and an asserted primal=dual EQUALITY), not a restriction on the population of laws. Every review explicitly offers the standard alternative ('outer bound / closure-sharp interval', 'weaken to the primal envelope'). This fails to be genuinely regime_defining; it is over-precision → statement_correction (NOT a theorem_split, which the producer's misclassification would have forced). (2a′) gates all hold: same object (the identified set / conditional value, restated as its standard closure / primal form), unconditional (the outer bound Θ_I⊆[L,U] and primal inf/sup are reproduced from the definitions under the existing Assumptions sampling–band, no new hypothesis), novelty-preserving (the copula-band primal characterization still differs from the copula-free / fixed-dependence / non-causal §4 comparators), no laundering (only the extremal/closure form is restated, no comparator estimand assumed). The second proposed premise [ass:root-n-local-sieve] for Theorem 2 is a genuine root-n stochastic-equicontinuity/sieve-remainder regularity (caveat), needs the existing producer caveat-grant hook (it is NOT a pure restatement and fails gate (ii)), so it is handled by the producer's own caveat path on the same Stage-0 rewind; this decision targets the dominant, mis-classified flagship defect.
